subject: Riolu, a small blue and black fighting-type biped, mid-stride in an outdoor setting
description: Riolu is depicted mid-stride or mid-step in a confident walking or running pose, its small blue and black body upright with arms slightly raised for balance. The creature has distinctive black facial mask markings and blue fur with black limbs and ears. The background is warm-toned with soft outdoor light suggesting an open field or path. The overall composition is energetic and conveys constant motion consistent with the flavor text about its boundless stamina.
foreground: Riolu mid-stride, arms up, confident stance
background: Warm outdoor tones, soft light, open environment
